programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: Simple yet interesting, both chicken Milanese and chicken piccata are reliable test kitchen favorites. We like to start them on the stovetop but finish the cooking in the oven

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: The test kitchen provides foolproof recipes for two classic pasta sauces: puttanesca and Bolognese.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: Pasta with garlic and oil is perhaps the most famous quick pasta dish. It starts with ingredients on hand—garlic, good olive oil, hot red pepper flakes—and turns them into something special and uncommonly good.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: We uncover the secrets to beef Burgundy at its best—and also show you a way to make portions of it ahead of time.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: We traveled to chili country, cooked with various experts in their kitchens, and tried out dozens of recipes in the test kitchen. We wanted a chili that would be hearty, heavy on the meat, and spicy but not overwhelmingly hot.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: Macaroni and cheese and turkey Tetrazzini are two classic casseroles, but they are rarely as good as they could be. We knew we could do better—much better—in the test kitchen.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: Pork chops are leaner than they used to be, which poses new problems for home cooks. We explain which chops to buy and how to cook them, ensuring perfectly cooked meat that is both crispy and juicy.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: On a hot summer's day, life doesn't get much better than a big, juicy, smoky slab of spicy, mouth-watering ribs. Our goal was to produce flavorful, juicy, tender ribs that would be well worth the time, money, and effort.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: We were intrigued with the notion of barbecuing a whole side of salmon. Our goal was to have this large piece of fish spend enough time over the coals to pick up some real wood flavor.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: We move the turkey out of the oven and onto the grill, freeing up precious cooking space for other Thanksgiving dishes and giving us a better tasting bird. We also perfect the flavor and texture of sweet potatoes and cranberry sauce.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: Beef tenderloin can cost a small fortune, but it is one of the quickest and easiest large cuts to serve to a crowd. The key is to get good color development on the exterior without overcooking the interior.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: Ham dinner—with green bean casserole—is classic American fare. But which kind of ham should you buy? And can you really make a "good" green bean casserole? We show you how.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: Our sour cream coffee cake and light, flavorful fruit salads transform weekend brunch into an indulgent meal you'll want to make even when company isn't coming over. A few tips on great coffee round out the perfect start to a day.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: The appeal of such quick bread as cinnamon buns and banana bread is clear. Supermarket cinnamon buns often have an odd, artificial flavor and sponge-like texture. And banana bread doesn't need to taste like over-the-hill bananas.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: Real country bread, the kind made by an artisan and never found at the supermarket, is a thing of beauty. We wanted to develop a recipe that was every bit as good as the best country loaves but that was still doable for the cook who bakes in a home oven.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: Thick, chewy chocolate cookies and spiced molasses cookies are classics. Watch as we discover which types of chocolate and molasses make these favorites great again.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: Lemon meringue pie is a three-part recipe—crust, lemon filling, and meringue—and each one can be a challenge. We discover which rolling pins are best and whether you can use store-bought pie crust in a pinch. Then we perfect the filling and meringue.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: What could be more American than strawberry shortcake? But sometimes this classic summer fare can go terribly wrong. When it comes to cherry cobbler, sour cherries are a must. But where do you get sour cherries? Are jarred cherries a worthy alternative?

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: Who can resist a chocolate cake? We wanted cakes that would be great tasting and easy to prepare, and we came up with two: old-fashioned, moist, and homey; the other elegant, dense, and ethereal.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: A true New York-style cheesecake should be pure and minimalist but also have just the right color, flavor, and density. With a crisp graham cracker crust and a filling that fades from creamy to cake-like, our cheesecake is worthy of any diner in New York.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: We set out to create flavorful, fresh-tasting versions of Greek and spinach salads.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: What's the best way to enjoy summer tomatoes? While it's hard to argue with sliced, salted tomatoes, there are times when you want to use tomatoes in more elaborate dishes, and gazpacho and a cheesy tart are two of our favorites.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: Chili is probably America's favorite one-pot supper and we wanted to create a great, simple version. And while no one thinks of a clambake as a one-pot wonder, we set out to make an indoor version simple enough to prepare even on a busy weeknight.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: We go to the test kitchen to show how to make the perfect clam chowder and delicious crab cakes.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: Watch as we figure out the best recipes for two New Orleans favorites—Jambalaya and bananas Foster.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: Tomatoes and pasta are a classic (and delicious) pairing, but sometimes you want a change. Vegetable sauces, like the two featured in this episode—one with mushrooms and one with broccoli rabe—are appealing options.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: Some pasta dishes take considerable time to prepare. But others don't have to. We set out to streamline Bolognese and baked four-cheese pasta to make them weeknight dining.

programme.desc: Bellator MMA is back with a bantamweight world title fight as Darrion Caldwell looks to defend his belt against dangerous opponent Leandro Higo. Card also features the return of baddest man on the planet, Joe Warren, as he takes on veteran Joe Taimanglo.

programme.title: Bellator MMA Full Fight Cards
programme.desc: Bellator MMA comes to Budapest with a lightweight showdown between Benson Henderson and Roger Huerta. Also on the card, heavy-handed wrestling phenom Ed Ruth and Bellator Kickboxing Champ Denise Kielholtz return to MMA.

programme.title: Bellator MMA Full Fight Cards
programme.desc: Bellator MMA is in St. Louis, MO with a barnburner main event as former lightweight champ Michael Chandler takes on Brandon Girtz. Also on the card, undefeated phenom, AJ McKee puts his record on the line when he meets Justin Lawrence.

programme.title: Bellator 198: Fedor vs Mir
programme.desc: Bellator MMA heads to Chicago, IL with a historic matchup in the Heavyweight Grand Prix as two former world champs collide when Fedor Emelianenko takes on Frank Mir. Plus Neiman Gracie returns to action, while submission ace Dillon Danis makes his debut.

programme.title: Bellator 199: Bader vs King Mo
programme.desc: Bellator MMA returns to San Jose with an absolutely stacked fight card as Ryan Bader collides with King Mo in Heavyweight Grand Prix action; Paul Daley takes on Jon Fitch in a dynamic matchup at welterweight, and Cheick Kongo and Javy Ayala go toe to toe.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: Cuando un joven desaparece de su casa en St. Louis, la UAC vuelve a investigar un caso similar sin resolver en busca del sospechoso.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: Cuando Ducky y Abby confirman que han identificado los restos de al menos cinco personas, el equipo de NCIS comienza inmediatamente a notificar a sus familias, con la intención de encontrar una conexión entre la azarosa selección de víctimas.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: El equipo de NCIS investiga cuando un Marine que aparentaba haber muerto congelado despierta en la mesa de autopsia de Ducky.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: Gibbs y el equipo investigan cuando una llamada en el fin de semana resulta en la muerte de dos agentes del NCIS. El equipo descubre que la información obtenida sobre actividad terrorista era una trampa para asesinarlos.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: Gibbs y el equipo investigan cuando el libro de Mcgee sobre un agente de la NCIS se convierte en realidad. McGee se horroriza cuando un contramaestre en el que basó al personaje de su libro es asesinado.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español)
programme.desc: El caso se vuelve personal para Danny cuando trabaja para proteger a la enfermera Faith Madson (Jessie Mueller) de su violento exnovio.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español)
programme.desc: El juicio de Eddie se ve nublado por su pasado cuando arresta a un conocido detestable de la universidad bajo cargos cuestionables.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español)
programme.desc: Danny y Baez se unen a una fuerza de tarea antidrogas para rastrear a un proveedor de drogas. Baez entra en contacto con las sustancias y pronto lucha por su vida debido a una sobredosis accidental.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español)
programme.desc: Erin está conflictuada cuando Jamie y Eddie le piden que elimine los cargos antiguos contra Parker Mack (Spencer House), un hombre que valientemente rescató a una mujer de una situación de rehenes.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: Cuando un joven desaparece de su casa en St. Louis, la UAC vuelve a investigar un caso similar sin resolver en busca del sospechoso.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: Cuando la UAC es llamado a Kansas para investigar una serie de asesinatos, una reunión tensa comienza entre Blake y su padre, un capitán de policía retirado, y su hermano, un detective, y deben trabajar juntos para ayudar a resolver el crimen.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: Cuando la UAC va a San José para investigar una serie de asesinatos, García profundiza en su pasado hacker y se reencuentra con su antiguo amor para ayudar al equipo con el caso.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: Mientras que el UAC busca un asesino múltiple suelto en Cleveland, Rossi se preocupa cuando un antiguo sargento de la Marina se pierde y se dirige a Los Ángeles para encontrarlo.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: Gibbs y el equipo investigan cuando el libro de Mcgee sobre un agente de la NCIS se convierte en realidad. McGee se horroriza cuando un contramaestre en el que basó al personaje de su libro es asesinado.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A suspect forgets to drive away after breaking into a used car lot. A dispute over money ends in tire slashing. Suspects are found with narcotics and tall tales.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A suspect fresh out of jail is found with narcotics. A motorcycle named 'Love Machine' is saved from a hot wire. A man bursts his tire in a bad place and officers come to the rescue.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Deputies halt a burglary in progress. A truck is pulled over for stolen plates and officers question how it can start with a house key. A RV is no home for a family on the brink of falling apart.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Security guards face wild threats from a suspect who states he has a 'burner' gun. A man is bit on the head and nearly faints. A passenger throws out a suspicious bag during a traffic stop.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A man can’t handle that his van is getting repossessed. An Uncle finds his nephew has been hiding all kinds of secrets. Past lovers find their old wounds have yet to heal.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Meth and alcohol cloud the tragic accusations between husband and wife. A man learns why you should report if you recover your stolen vehicle. A woman says heroin is the only thing that can heal her.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Deputies race against time to save a young boy who is trapped inside a house fire. An intoxicated patron demands a beer on credit and argues with a store clerk. An older woman struggles with heroin.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A motorcycle with no license plate crashes while fleeing from Deputies. A woman driving a car with no windshield blames her ex-boyfriend. A gun is found hidden in a seat during a traffic stop.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A stabbing victim has his throat slashed while waiting for his wife. A man is shocked to learn that his rental box truck was reported stolen. Spice is found in a nervous passenger's purse.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Officers spot two suspects on a city bus and a prolonged standoff occurs. A wanted man's friends lie to Deputies about his whereabouts. Deputies find meth in a one-armed man's truck.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A stolen car and its occupants roll into a canal and are fished out by Deputies. A shoplifting trio is caught with stolen goods. A trip to the mechanic ends in an arrest.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A car chase ends when a driver foot bails at a restaurant. A nervous female driver blows smoke at Deputies and refuses to exit her truck. A domestic violence suspect talks in circles when questioned.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A disgruntled man is tased, leaving his unhoused wife to fend for herself. A sovereign citizen is arrested for a stolen firearm. A man in possession of meth claims a bag belongs to his girlfriend.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A man caught with a stolen moped attempts to run while handcuffed. Police find a man with his pants down behind a business. A suspect found asleep in his poorly parked car complains of sciatic pain.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A stolen truck drives against traffic during a pursuit. A DV suspect overdoses after fighting Deputies. An intoxicated father assaults his openly-gay son and hides behind a tree.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Spike strips are used to end a pursuit, but not before a woman falls out. A passenger flees from a stop and changes clothes. A woman from Oklahoma driving a windowless car admits to using meth.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: 51 kilos of cocaine are found on a semi-truck during a traffic stop. A man on a bike tosses meth and weed as he flees into the woods. A woman uses a fire extinguisher to damage her girlfriend's door.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A dispensary security guard is shot by an angry client who dropped his ID. A woman is injured when she crashes a stolen car into a tree. A man barricades himself inside an apartment with his mother.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A man flees from cops and reaches a dead end. A 40mm impact round is used to gain compliance when he reaches for his pockets. A man claims his anger got the best of him during an armed robbery.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A driver foot bails from a still-rolling van and hides nearby. A teen on a dirt bike refuses to stop for Deputies. A man attempts to run from a traffic stop but gets hung up on a fence.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: After crashing a car during a pursuit, the driver runs into a pho restaurant and is captured. A loitering suspect is spotted smoking a meth pipe. A drunk driver is pulled from a smoking wreck.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Suspects in a white van throw a bike at police during a wild pursuit. A man runs from Deputies on a mini-bike. A mermaid commits traffic infractions and is caught with pills.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A man arguing with his father over money fights with three Deputies after an unsuccessful Taser deployment. A motorcycle runs from cops in Fontana. A suspect in Alameda County rams a patrol vehicle.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A Deputy learns a new game from Spring Break coeds. Deputies respond to a shooting at the beach. A teenager is caught with alcohol. A woman tells Deputies she's being followed on the boardwalk.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: An intoxicated teen is found passed out in the surf late at night. Deputies find trespassers in a hot tub. A floating wallet is returned. The Marine Unit rescues a family thrown from jet skis.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: An underaged spring breaker is caught with a 'blackout rage gallon' and issued a ticket. A zero-tolerance policy of no alcohol or glass containers on the beach is enforced in Pinellas County.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Officers encounter dancing tourists on the Vegas Strip. An uncooperative spring breaker finds herself in cuffs. Surfers and lifeguards rescue swimmers from a riptide. A beachgoer lies about his age.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Catherine's testimony in court is not enough to convict a killer suspected of murdering his own mother. Adam Novak, with whom Catherine had a brief romantic encounter, is the lawyer who represents the killer and secures his freedom.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: The lead suspect for the high-profile murder of anti-drug crusading assemblyman Danilo Zamesca is Thomas Simon, the west coast's biggest drug supplier.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: As Catherine and Keppler begin to investigate the murder of a teen-aged Jane Doe, both agree that the killer, who was meticulous in removing evidence from the body and its surrounding area, is likely a repeat offender.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: A case involving a man's torched corpse whose bones and tissues had been harvested leads Nick and Keppler into the disturbing world of illegally sold human body parts.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Grissom returns from his teaching sabbatical as new member of the team, Michael Keppler desperately tries to keep his dark past hidden from his colleagues.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: With potentially less than a day to attempt to prevent the next murders, the CSI team must quickly shake off their shock that the true miniature killer is not the late Ernie Edward Dell, who committed suicide after confessing to the slayings.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Grissom's quip that two missing young lovers may have run off to Mexico is soon quashed by the discovery of drops of blood by the boy's vacant parking spot at the high school.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: While processing the house where several showgirls were murdered, Sara is haunted by the terrified eyes and cryptic dying words of the sixth victim she discovers.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Greg is forced to again contend with the hostile mother and brother of the hoodlum he killed in self-defense several months ago when the CSI team discovers that the brother is involved in a new murder case.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: While Grissom and the rest of the CSIs are out investigating new cases, Hodges leads Archie, Henry, Mandy and Wendy to believe that Grissom wants them to secretly band together that evening in an attempt to solve the four miniature killer cases.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: In their attempt to identify the murderer of a has-been boxer who lived among a group of prostitutes who detested him, the CSIs must establish which of several life-threatening acts against him in one night actually killed him.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: The CSI team investigates the murder of a blackjack dealer whose estranged husband has ties to a club of UFO believers.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Sara is uneasy about Grissom being reunited with Lady Heather during the CSIs' investigation of her attempted murder by a client she refuses to name.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: As the CSI team comes closer than ever to identifying the miniature killer, Sara mysteriously goes missing, forcing her relationship with Grissom out into the open.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: En la primera parte de un episodio crossover de dos partes que concluirá en Without A Trace, una víctima de secuestro de Nueva York que desapareció hace seis años puede ser el mismo chico cuya muerte Grissom y el equipo de CSI están investigando.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Un sospechoso del pasado de Sara regresa, haciendo que se cuestione su futuro como CSI.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: La adicción de Warrick a las pastillas empieza a afectar a su trabajo cuando su investigación sobre la mafia clandestina de Las Vegas le convierte en el principal sospechoso de un asesinato relacionado con la mafia.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Hodges tiene segundas intenciones cuando escenifica hipotéticos asesinatos en el laboratorio para dar a sus colegas la oportunidad de jugar a ser CSI.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Grissom y su equipo se adentran en el mundo de las peleas ilegales de perros para averiguar quién es el responsable de la muerte de una acaudalada dama de la alta sociedad.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Grissom y su equipo investigan dos asesinatos que tienen lugar en el rodeo anual de monta de toros de Las Vegas.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Grissom y su equipo luchan contra la gripe cuando el fiscal Klein les pide que investiguen la muerte de varios testigos clave para un caso del gran jurado contra una peligrosa banda de Las Vegas.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: La inquietante muerte de una niña de 3 años tiene un gran impacto en Catherine mientras busca pistas sobre su asesinato.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Brass y Nick reciben ayuda de una fuente poco probable, un criminal encarcelado (Method Man), cuando investigan dos asesinatos que tienen lugar en el mismo edificio de apartamentos.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Grissom y su equipo descubren varias víctimas que tienen sangre verde, lo que les lleva a la conclusión de que sus muertes están conectadas de algún modo.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Grissom y el equipo de CSI se ven envueltos en el mundo de la comedia de Hollywood cuando una diva de las comedias de situación (Sagal) muere prematuramente durante el rodaje de su programa en Las Vegas.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Warrick es acusado de asesinar a un famoso gángster de Las Vegas e incluso él no está seguro de su culpabilidad o inocencia.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Gil Grissom es el supervisor del turno de noche de los investigadores de élite de la escena del crimen de Las Vegas. Holly Gribbs, recién salida de la academia, se une al equipo.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Un hombre es asesinado después de haber ganado una fortuna y haber dejado a su novia. Entonces, Grissom, Nick y la recién llegada al equipo de CSI, Sara Sidle, investigan este caso.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: South Beach Miami’s sexiest nightclub becomes a hotbed of revenge when murder closes the doors on a unique dating service.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: An eight-year-old girl becomes the innocent pawn in an ugly and abusive game that ends in murder. Horatio and the CSI team investigate.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: A high school reunion turns deadly when a classmate acts on a 15-year-old grudge, Horatio and Yelina discover that Ray may still be alive.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: The CSI Team works against a ticking clock to find the purported accomplice in a years-old ax-murder case before the convicted killer is executed.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: The CSI team races against time to locate and deactivate a radioactive bomb set to go off in the middle of downtown Miami.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Horatio and the CSI team face off with Miami’s notorious and deadly Mala Noche gang after a funeral becomes the scene of a murder.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: A family boating accident reveals a sinister plot by grifters to heist 10 million dollars in gold bars. Horatio and the CSI team investigate.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: The team investigates the murder of a teenage girl partying in Miami on her way to the Bahamas with her high school class.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: A young man faces life in prison – and possibly worse – unless Horatio can prove his innocence against insurmountable odds.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Horatio and the team race against time to find out who is trying to frame Horatio for the murder of a woman he’s been dating.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: When a "wives weekend" ends in murder, the CSI team is faced with three women whose separate trysts with the victim make them prime suspects

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: The team works in tandem with NY CSI chief Mac Taylor to apprehend a serial killer before he kills the young girl he has just taken hostage

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Ryan Wolfe is attacked and seriously injured while investigating the murder of a distraught soon-to-be ex-wife, and there is no shortage of suspects.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Horatio and the CSI team must rely on a video game for their next clue as to where a group of young gunmen will strike next.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Tres jugadores de vóleibol caen muertos misteriosamente en la cancha mientras el testimonio de Calleigh contra Delko amenaza su futuro como CSI.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Cuando el hombre más odiado de Miami es asesinado, Horatio Caine y el equipo de CSI van a la caza de su asesino y su tesoro escondido.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Alexx Woods y Eric Delko regresan para ayudar a Horatio Caine y al equipo de CSI a detener un brote viral mortal en la hermosa Miami.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Horatio Caine y el equipo de CSI recrean una noche de libertinaje de una despedida de soltero para resolver un asesinato y encontrar a un novio desaparecido.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Horatio Caine llama al Dr. Ray Langston del equipo de CSI de Las Vegas para que venga a Miami cuando se descubre una pierna amputada en los Everglades.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Cuando Horatio y el equipo de CSI investigan quién o qué causó un horrible accidente de auto, se revelan los secretos más oscuros de ambos conductores.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: En la hermosa Miami, se están usando medusas mortales como arma asesina y regresa una misteriosa mujer del pasado de Jesse.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: La investigación sobre la muerte de un trabajador del censo coloca al equipo en una persecución de autos a alta velocidad y en una explosión que amenaza la vida de dos CSI.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Eric Delko regresa a Miami como testigo experto de la defensa y enfrenta a sus viejos amigos, Horatio y el equipo de CSI.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Cuando la novia de Estados Unidos, Phoebe Nichols, arde en llamas durante un concierto, el equipo de CSI expone el lado oscuro del estrellato pop.

programme.title: CSI: Miami

programme.desc: Cuando Kate cumple 30 años, sus amigas Evie y Charlie se ofrecen a hacer una fiesta, pero la fiesta se sale de control.

programme.title: Una boda complicada
programme.desc: Meg y Tyler nunca se llevaron bien entre sí, pero pronto tendrán que trabajar juntos para salvar el casamiento de sus mejores amigos. Ellos se darán cuenta de que hacen un buen equipo y que quizá hay lugar en este casamiento para un poco de romance.

programme.title: Prueba de amor

programme.title: Bridget Jones: Al borde de la razón
programme.desc: Después de seis semanas perfectas con su novio Mark Darcy, el pícaro Daniel Cleaver vuelve, afirmando ser un hombre reformado. ¿Encontrará Bridget una forma de hacer que el amor perdure para siempre?

programme.title: Padre soltero
programme.desc: Ben Affleck, Jennifer López y George Carlin protagonizan esta comedia irresistible. Un relato sincero sobre un hombre que de repente es un padre soltero, aprendiendo que debe aceptar su identidad y reconocer lo que lo hace feliz.

programme.title: Pisando furete
programme.desc: Cuando se trata de imponer la ley, un solo hombre puede marcar la diferencia. Dwayne 'la Roca' Johnson no tiene piedad al hacer imperar la justicia y aplastar la corrupción en esta historia de un hombre que decide actuar para recuperar su ciudad.

programme.title: Atrapen al gringo
programme.desc: Un criminal de carrera, capturado por las autoridades mexicanas, es enviado a una prisión de alta seguridad donde aprende a sobrevivir con la ayuda de un niño

programme.title: Venganza
programme.desc: Durante su permiso de libertad provisional, un convicto logra escapar de los guardias y planea su venganza contra aquellos que lo convirtieron en un asesino a sangre fría.

programme.title: Asesinatos accidentales
programme.desc: Mike Fallon es un sicario experimentado conocido por hacer que la muerte de sus objetivos parezca un accidente. Cuando su novia aparece muerta, él va tras sus antiguos colegas para encontrar al responsable.

programme.title: El gringo
programme.desc: "El hombre" cruza a México con $2,000,000 en efectivo y un plan para vivir lo que le queda en la playa, pero se queda atrapado en el pueblo "El Fronteras". Bajo ataque de policías corruptos, debe salvar "El Fronteras" a través de espectaculares tiroteos.

programme.title: Apocalypto
programme.desc: Cuando el reino maya está al borde del colapso, un joven se embarca en un peligroso viaje hacia un mundo dominado por el miedo y la opresión.

programme.title: Fuera del cielo
programme.desc: El drama de 24 horas comienza a las 6 de la mañana con el joven Cucú, cuyo hermano Malboro lo recibe después de una separación de cinco años. Una vez reunidos, planean un robo que los lleva a una serie de encuentros con diferentes personas.

programme.title: El infierno
programme.desc: Benny ha sido deportado de los Estados Unidos a México, que está siendo destrozado por las guerras de los carteles de droga. Luego se involucra en el negocio del narcotráfico y comienza a subir de rango.

programme.title: Purasangre

programme.title: Hazlo como hombre

programme.title: Ilusiones S.A.
programme.desc: Para hacer feliz a su mujer, un hombre contrata a una empresa que crea fantasías para fingir que su nieto, quien los dejó hace años, es un hombre de bien. Pero el verdadero nieto, quien es en realidad un delincuente, se aparece exigiendo dinero.

programme.title: Recién cazado
programme.desc: Sebastián es un destacado enólogo que lleva una vida desordenada y una mañana, al despertar de una parranda, descubre que contrajo matrimonio la noche anterior con Alexa. A partir de ese momento buscará anular el compromiso.

programme.title: Viernes 13, parte VIII: Jason invade Manhattan

programme.title: Viernes 13

programme.title: Viernes 13: parte 2

programme.title: Viernes 13, parte 3
programme.desc: Ignorando el sangriento legado de Camp Crystal Lake, uno por uno son víctimas del maníaco Jason que los acecha a cada paso ...

programme.title: Viernes 13: El capítulo final
programme.desc: Después de su renacimiento en una morgue del hospital, el asesino de la máscara de hockey fija su atención vengativa en la familia Jarvis y un grupo de adolescentes hasta ahora despreocupados.

programme.title: Viernes 13, parte V: un nuevo comienzo
programme.desc: Esta vez parece haber puesto la mira en los pacientes jóvenes de una casa aislada. Y más de unos pocos de sus objetivos adolescentes terminan por la mitad, en cuartos ... lo que sea, Jason lo hace.

programme.title: Viernes 13, parte VI: Jason vive
programme.desc: Cuando era niño, Tommy Jarvis hizo lo que muchos otros murieron tratando de hacer. Mató a Jason Vorhees, el asesino en masa que aterrorizó a los residentes de Crystal Lake.

programme.title: Viernes 13, parte VII: la nueva sangre
programme.desc: Desde que el maníaco homicida Jason Voorhees quedó atrapado en cadenas en el fondo de Crystal Lake, el campamento de verano cercano ha funcionado sin problemas ... sin asesinato.

programme.title: La mujer de mis pesadillas
programme.desc: Ben Stiller personifica a Eddie, el soltero empedernido de 40 años que finalmente da el "sí" a la hermosa Lila. Pero durante la luna de miel, la mujer de sus sueños resulta ser una completa pesadilla.

programme.title: Número De Suerte
programme.desc: John Travolta y Lisa Kudrow forman un "equipo de comedia de alta energía" en esta comedia divertida inspirada en una estafa de la vida real para ganar la lotería de Pensilvania.

programme.title: Envidia
programme.desc: Un hombre empieza a sentir cada vez más celos del nuevo éxito de su amigo.

programme.title: Pootie Tang: luce tu cuerpo y lo gozarás
programme.desc: Cuando la guerra unipersonal de Pootie contra la avaricia, la injusticia y los productos poco saludables comienza a afectar las ganancias de Lecter Corp, el demente director ejecutivo logra desmoronarlo, ¡golpeando su cinturón mágico!

programme.title: Cocodrilo Dundee
programme.desc: Michael J. "Cocodrilo" Dundee es un australiano de espíritu libre que caza cocodrilos con las manos, les clava la mirada a búfalos de agua y bebe hasta desmadrarse.

programme.title: "Cocodrilo" Dundee II
programme.desc: Justo cuando el australiano excéntrico comienza a acostumbrarse a la vida en la ciudad de Nueva York, Dundee y su hermosa novia (Linda Kozlowski) son blanco de muerte de una pandilla de feroces traficantes de drogas.

programme.title: Cocodrilo Dundee en Los Ángeles
programme.desc: Cocodrilo Dundee regresa en otro divertido episodio de la querida saga de películas. Después de que la novia de Mick, Sue, haya sido asignada a la oficina de L.A. del periódico de su padre, Mick, Sue y su hijo Mickey, se van a Hollywood.

programme.title: Hang 'Em High
programme.desc: Clint Eastwood stars in this brazen tale about a rampaging band of vigilantes who make two mistakes: they hang the wrong man and they don't finish the job. Inger Stevens, Pat Hingle, Bruce Dern & Dennis Hopper co-star in this action-packed western.

programme.title: Hud
programme.desc: Hud Bannon (Paul Newman) is the rebellious son of a respectable rancher who’s continually at odds with his aging father. Patricia Neal and Melvyn Douglas co-star, in their Oscar®-winning roles.

programme.title: The Misfits
programme.desc: In their final screen performances, Clark Gable and Marilyn Monroe are at their luminous best as an aging cowboy and a disillusioned divorcee, each trying to adapt to new ways of life in John Huston's piercing classic. Montgomery Clift also stars.

programme.title: Barbed Wire
programme.desc: In 1878, Gene Autry is a cattle buyer who tries to settle a battle between the cattlemen and homesteaders, when the latter are worked up into a feverish pitch by unscrupulous landowner Steve Rutledge.

programme.title: The Way West
programme.desc: Icons Kirk Douglas, Robert Mitchum and Richard Widmark star in this sumptuous, epic tale of the brave men and women in the U.S. who left the comfort and safety of life in the East for the promise of free land a better life in the untamed West.

programme.title: Return To Lonesome Dove
programme.desc: Back in Texas, Capt. Call organizes a mustang drive to Montana. He hires a Gideon, a former Texas Ranger, to head the drive. Newt falls into trouble in is rescued by a crusty rancher named Dunnegan.

programme.title: Return To Lonesome Dove
programme.desc: Gideon's mustang drive encounters problems. Agostina must fend off the unwanted advances of cowboys. Call makes his way to Clara's ranch, and then moves on to Montana.

programme.title: Sunset Boulevard (1950)
programme.desc: Intense, enthralling, and unforgettable, Sunset Boulevard stars Gloria Swanson as Norma Desmond, a faded silent-movie star, and William Holden as Joe Gillis, a down-on-his-luck screenwriter whom she enlists to help her make her triumphant return.

programme.title: Some Like It Hot
programme.desc: This hysterical comedy from director Billy Wilder finds Tony Curtis and Jack Lemmon masquerading as women in order to elude irate Chicago mobsters while befriending a beautiful singer (Marilyn Monroe).

programme.title: The Apartment

programme.title: Danger: Diabolik

programme.title: Planet Of The Vampires

programme.title: The Secret Life of Walter Mitty

programme.desc: LeBeau wants to escape, leaving Stalag 13 without its resident chef.

programme.desc: Hogan first saves, then helps to escape, a German radio expert who the Germans want dead.

programme.title: Hogan's Heroes

programme.desc: Hogan and company tell a German mole, disguised as an American aviator, all about their operation.

programme.title: Hogan's Heroes
programme.desc: Col. Hogan and his Heroes assist local resistance forces sabotage hidden explosive stashes the Gestapo plans to use to destroy bridges and other resources as the Nazis prepare to retreat from advancing Allied Forces.

programme.title: Taxi

programme.desc: Louie is worried his blind girlfriend will no longer love him if an operation to restore her sight is successful.

programme.title: Taxi

programme.title: Taxi

programme.title: Maude

programme.title: Maude

programme.title: Maude
programme.desc: A chance meeting with her ex-husband sparks an old flame in Vivian...and Maude adds fuel to the fire by unwittingly encouraging Viv to see Chuck along.

programme.title: Maude

programme.title: Maude

programme.title: In The Heat Of The Night

programme.title: In The Heat Of The Night

programme.title: In The Heat Of The Night

programme.title: In The Heat Of The Night

programme.title: In The Heat Of The Night

programme.desc: On a bitter morning in 1980, radio intern Helene Pruszynski is found brutalized in a snowy field. After 37 years of fruitless leads, investigators tap into a genealogy website that gives them a lead.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En 1988, cuando un paciente muere inesperadamente en el consultorio del neurólogo de California, Richard Boggs, la policía comienza lo que creen que será una investigación de rutina.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Cuando se encuentra un cuerpo descompuesto metido en un barril, es fácil suponer un asesinato. Pero el cuerpo había sido colocado en el barril 30 años antes. Una de las pocas pistas fue una libreta de direcciones que se encontró junto con el cuerpo.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Poco después del amanecer, se inicia un incendio en un contenedor de basura en Vancouver. Nadie ve al pirómano ni el fuego, que arde durante horas en el estacionamiento desolado. Pero hay más que basura en este contenedor en llamas.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Una mujer joven de repente se enferma gravemente y, finalmente, no puede caminar. Una prueba de médula ósea revela la causa: arsénico.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Un violador en serie anda suelto en una ciudad de Texas. Nadie sabía dónde atacaría a continuación, pero la audacia de sus ataques y la escalada de violencia contra sus víctimas hicieron que encontrarlo fuera imperativo.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: Cuatro caminos
programme.desc: Una mujer nativa americana fue brutalmente asesinada en el desierto de Nuevo México y la escena del crimen estaba llena de evidencia forense.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Robert Sims regresa a casa después de trabajar en el turno de noche y encuentra a su esposa inconsciente en el piso de la cocina. Su hijo está profundamente dormido en una habitación de arriba, pero su hija de seis semanas, Heather, no está.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Una joven mujer asiste a los servicios religiosos de la tarde y luego desaparece. Cuando se encuentra su automóvil abandonado, el tanque está vacío y falta una lata de gasolina que tenía en su baúl para emergencias.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: Un embrague de testigos
programme.desc: Dos testigos presenciales pueden tener la llave de la muerte de un miembro de una pandilla de motociclistas.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: La noticia del brutal asesinato de una azafata hizo que el hijo de una víctima que había sido asesinada cinco años antes se pusiera en contacto con la policía.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: Un disparo en la oscuridad
programme.desc: Una mujer es asesinada a tiros. ¿Pero fue un homicidio o un suicidio? Se necesitaría la experiencia de expertos forenses y dos juicios con jurado para determinar el destino del asesino acusado.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: Camino fatal
programme.desc: Un patrullero de carreteras fue enviado a lo que pensó que sería un accidente de tráfico de rutina hasta que miró en el automóvil.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Una fría noche de Diciembre de 1993, Rose Larner se detuvo en una tienda cuando se dirigía a la casa de su novio. Nunca más se la vio ni se supo de ella.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En la búsqueda del asesino de dos adolescentes de Texas, un perfil de conducta llevó a sospechar de Jason Massey. La ciencia demostró que el perfil era correcto y Massey fue ejecutado mediante inyección letal el 3 de Abril del 2001.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: Intrusión bienvenida
programme.desc: Un hombre le dice a la policía que le disparó a un intruso que había atacado y asesinado a su esposa. El marido pinta un cuadro trágico y es apodado héroe.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Cuando una bomba casera estalló en una casa rural, la policía no tenía idea de quién era el responsable.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En 2007, el trailer de Effie y Michael Ratley en Florida se incendia y Michael heroicamente rescata a su esposa e hijo. Un mes después, su esposa es encontrada golpeada hasta la muerte en una habitación de la casa de sus padres.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Un asesino en serie andaba suelto y la policía tenía que encontrarlo antes de que atacara nuevamente. Su pista más prometedora era inusual: una huella dactilar sangrienta en el cuerpo de una de las víctimas.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: La esposa de un oficial de policía muy respetado es asesinada en su propio hogar. El crimen quedó sin resolver por más de una década, hasta que se forma una nueva unidad de casos sin resolver, que le dan un nuevo vistazo a la evidencia.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Los cuerpos de varias mujeres se encuentran en una colina distante en California. La policía hace un descubrimiento cuando una prostituta se escapa y logra identificar a su agresor y su automóvil.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Se denuncia la desaparición de una mujer tras una pelea con su marido. La policía sospecha de un hombre que denunció un incendio en su automóvil. En el interior se encuentran dos diminutas gotas de sangre.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Durante seis años, un asesino en serie merodeó por las calles de la ciudad de Nueva York.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Aunque su hija ha escapado antes, ella siempre ha regresado. Sus padres estaban seguros de que esta vez no sería diferente, pero estaban equivocados.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En la víspera de Navidad de 2005, se encuentra el cuerpo de un hombre ardiendo cerca de Baltimore. Finalmente fue identificado como Wesley Person, de 26 años.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En el año 2000, Darrell North, un gerente de construcción, fue encontrado muerto en su tráiler del trabajo en Fort Worth, Texas.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En 2003, el adolescente de St. Cloud, Jason MacLennan, regresó a su casa después de una noche con amigos y descubrió el cuerpo de su padre tirado en un charco de sangre.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Cuando una mujer desaparecía sin dejar rastro, había dos posibles explicaciones: secuestro o asesinato.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Manny’s moved back home but the honeymoon between she and her parents is just about over. And when her dad insists she have a traditional “Debut” – the lavish party many Filipino girls have for their 18th birthday – Manny takes a stand.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Ellie’s ex-mentor Caitlin Ryan arrives to do a guest lecture series in Jesse’s class and Ellie sees her opportunity to set herself apart from her peers. She throws herself into Caitlin’s class assignment and her hard work quickly pays off.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Emma decides she’ll do what it takes to get back on track, starting by rekindling her friendship with Manny, but when Manny wants to hit an audition to be a ‘Purple Dragon’ sports drink model, Emma finds herself quickly at odds with her best friend.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Spinner deals with chemo, timing how long he can go between barf-buckets, while his cheerleader Jane, tries to bring the party to him.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Marco and Ellie’s retail therapy goes awry when Marco finds his credit card maxed out. Ellie rescues him this time, but Marco realizes a new job is the real solution—and might even give him the opportunity to meet new people.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Roofie rape victim Darcy is barreling down a self-destructive path and only a handful of people know why.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Manny and Jay’s faux-mance is working perfectly. But when Jay gets too serious, Manny reminds him it's all fake.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: After Manny discovers that her University demo reel is actually a sex tape that she and Jay made, her future hangs in the balance. By the time Jay catches up to her with the correct DVD, it's too late.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: When cute and funny Rachel joins Peter, Danny & Derek’s MI group for their “How-To” video project, confidence is high.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Mia’s finally been granted a spot on Spirit Squad, and she’s ecstatic. But trying to be a normal teenager is proving a difficult balancing act.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Paige is on her A game - she's excelling at work, Andrea's given her a raise, and she’s going to use the money to redesign her bedroom.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Since Snake’s suspension from teaching, Emma’s life has been turned upside-down. He’s really in a funk, and the dark cloud over his head has fouled the air at home, where Emma finds herself caught in the no-man’s-land between her parents.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Jimmy finally gets the news he’s been waiting for – he’s been accepted into NYU! But he’s got other things on his mind. He is slowly discovering that he has other options when it comes to his real dream – walking again.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: It’s Anya’s first year running the Free The Children Freedom Fast to promote education and health in Africa. She has a lot to coordinate - which would be hard enough without meddling Holly J, who’s determined to make Anya choose between her and Sav.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Mia’s renewed relationship with Lucas is making her feel like she’s on top of the world. With the extra free time afforded by his help, she's taking on all the high school things her parenting has kept her from enjoying.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Marco’s world is rocked when Paige drops a bomb – her dad’s going to help her buy a condo. Ellie’s just learned she might be up for the editorship of the Core newspaper, so she’s distracted.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Spinner and Jimmy have just one more exam before they’re finally done school and, with Jimmy's help, Spinner's sure he can pass and enjoy his cancer-free future.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: With time ticking towards the Class of ’07 Prom and Graduation ceremony, Liberty has the perfect night planned: a hotel prom, with the amazing Natasha Bedingfield performing.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Relieved of parental duty for the year by mom, Mia starts the school year off with a bang by bonding with new girl, Leia, and getting scouted to be the new face of football star Tom Blakes’ shoe line.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Mia does what she can to ensure her success. Besides, Tom is handsome and famous, so Mia thinks being with Tom to get ahead isn’t such a bad trade.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Jane wants to play football but since there is no girls team, then boys’ football it is. The Shep doesn’t like the idea one bit, but once Jane proves she’s faster, stronger, and more athletic than most of the team, he relents…

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Eager to make the most of her college experience, Liberty jumps at the chance to rush the most popular sorority at Smithdale. Determined to get in, Liberty slowly exchanges old habits and old friends (Manny and Emma) for sorority approved ones.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Peter begins a relationship with Mia and a friendship with Riley. Finding a balance between a new girlfriend and a new guy friend gets confusing, especially when Riley is suddenly kissing Peter.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Sav and Anya plan to celebrate their six-month anniversary on the school’s overnight trip. Only problem? Alli, Sav’s sister, convinces their parents to let her go on the trip on the condition that Sav spends every second with her.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Mia’s T-Bombz campaign is hitting the city and Degrassi. But Holly J has bigger and better things going on. She’s prepping the Power Squad for an out-of-town competition, and things are looking good.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Spinner and Jane have plans for next year – she’ll start pre-law and he’ll attend Police College. When he doesn’t get in, he can’t bear to tell her, so he lies.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Desperate to win Jane back, Spinner sneaks into the Leadership Convention Jane is speaking at and proposes. When Jane turns him down, Spinner breaks up with her – nothing he does is ever good enough.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Rick decides to get back at his bullies, hitting them right where it hurts – their cars. But when Jimmy becomes a member of the “Whack Your Brain” team, the two form a truce.

programme.title: Monsters We Met
programme.desc: America was once home to such fierce predators as the giant short-faced bear and the saber-toothed tiger.

programme.title: Monsters We Met
programme.desc: In Australia 65,000 years ago, the first human explorers face a land populated with giant lizards, killer rhino-like creatures and deadly birds.

programme.title: Monsters We Met
programme.desc: The Maori struggled for survival 1,000 years ago in a New Zealand populated by giant birds.

programme.title: Walking with Beasts
programme.desc: Special effects-filled documentary beginning 49 million years ago. The world is heavily forested and birds rule the planet, preying on small mammals. Whales have not yet evolved and their ancestors walk on the land.

programme.title: Walking with Beasts
programme.desc: A pregnant basilosaurus, an 18-metre, carnivorous whale which lives in the Tethys Sea, is forced to kill the young of a smaller whale to ensure the survival of her unborn calf.

programme.title: Walking with Beasts
programme.desc: Going back 25 million years to the time of the indricothere, which was the largest mammal ever to live on dry land, being seven metres high and weighing 15 tons! The only threat to an adult would have been the hyaenadon which was the size of a rhino.

programme.title: Walking with Beasts
programme.desc: The beginnings of mankind can be traced back 3.2 million years to Ethiopia and the advent of Australopithecus, a type of ape which, like humans, was bipedal. These early members of the human family faced many dangers, including the sabre-toothed cat.

programme.title: Walking with Beasts
programme.desc: Revealing the exotic, oversized creatures that inhabited South America one million years ago, such as the deadly smilodon, the largest of all sabre tooth cats.

programme.title: Walking with Beasts
programme.desc: Looking at the depths of the Ice Age, following a group of mammoths who have been forced to travel south with the advent of winter. On a dangerous journey across the Alps, many become trapped in bogs or fall victim to predators.

programme.title: Ancient Worlds
programme.desc: Starting in Uruk, the `mother of all cities', in southern Iraq, Richard travels to Syria, Egypt, Anatolia and Greece, tracing the birth and development of technology and culture.

programme.title: Ancient Worlds
programme.desc: Richard looks at the winners and losers of the great Bronze Age collapse, and the new powers that emerged in the harder-edged Age of Iron.

programme.title: Ancient Worlds
programme.desc: Richard Miles explores the power and the paradox of the `Greek Thing', a blossoming in art, philosophy and science that went hand-in-hand with political discord, social injustice and endless war.

programme.title: Ancient Worlds
programme.desc: In Richard Miles's epic story of civilisation, there have been plenty of examples of the great men of history, but none came close to the legend of Alexander of Macedon, known as `the Great'.

programme.title: Ancient Worlds
programme.desc: Archaeologist and historian Richard Miles examines the phenomenon of the Roman Republic, from its fratricidal mythical beginnings, with the legend of Romulus and Remus, to the all too real violence of its end.

programme.title: Ancient Worlds
programme.desc: The material benefits of the `good order' delivered by Roman rule provided its citizens and subjects with the security to ask profound questions about the meaning of life, questions that the Roman belief system was ill-equipped to answer.

programme.title: The X-Creatures
programme.desc: Chris Packham is out to determine whether the Himalayan Yeti and the Sumatran Orang Pendek exist.

programme.title: The X-Creatures
programme.desc: Chris Packham embarks on a mission to investigate the existence of the mythical giant squid.

programme.title: Classic Doctor Who
programme.desc: The time travellers are in grave danger as the TARDIS nears total disintegration.

programme.title: Classic Doctor Who
programme.desc: The TARDIS lands on the English coast in 1066.

programme.title: Classic Doctor Who
programme.desc: The Doctor is held prisoner by the Monk in the monastery.

programme.title: Classic Doctor Who
programme.desc: Steven and Vicki discover an atomic bazooka.

programme.title: Classic Doctor Who
programme.desc: Discovering the Monk's plan, the Doctor is determined to stop him meddling.

programme.title: Classic Doctor Who
programme.desc: The Doctor discovers archaeologists trying to find the lost tombs of the Cybermen.

programme.title: Classic Doctor Who
programme.desc: The Doctor and archaeologists discover the city of Telos isn't as dead as they assumed.

programme.title: Classic Doctor Who
programme.desc: Trapped in the tombs, the Cybermen release their poisonous pets, Cybermats.

programme.title: Classic Doctor Who
programme.desc: How will the Doctor rid Telos of Cybermen once and for all?

programme.title: Classic Doctor Who
programme.desc: The Doctor is forced to use the emergency unit, removing them from time space dimension!

programme.title: Classic Doctor Who
programme.desc: Zoe, Jamie and the Doctor are transported to a puzzling world where they are confronted by riddles.

programme.title: Classic Doctor Who
programme.desc: The Doctor and his companions are apparently being tested, but by whom and why?

programme.title: Classic Doctor Who
programme.desc: The Doctor and Zoe have to fight the fabled Medusa and a 21st Century comic strip creation.

programme.title: Classic Doctor Who
programme.desc: The Doctor attempts to save his companions but instead finds himself imprisoned.

programme.title: Classic Doctor Who
programme.desc: The TARDIS arrives in no man's land during World War I.

programme.title: Classic Doctor Who
programme.desc: The Doctor, Jamie and Zoe make their escape in Lady Jennifer's ambulance.

programme.title: Classic Doctor Who
programme.desc: The Doctor discovers that they are on a planet where soldiers fight never ending wars.

programme.title: Classic Doctor Who
programme.desc: The Doctor and Zoe penetrate the Aliens' HQ.

programme.title: Classic Doctor Who
programme.desc: In the American Civil War zone, Jamie and Lady Jennifer join forces.

programme.title: Classic Doctor Who
programme.desc: The Doctor sends Zoe to the war zones to assemble a resistance force.

programme.title: Classic Doctor Who
programme.desc: The Doctor, Jamie and Carstairs have escaped back to the 1917 war zone.

programme.title: Classic Doctor Who

programme.title: Classic Doctor Who
programme.desc: The rebels seize control of the Aliens' HQ.

programme.title: Classic Doctor Who
programme.desc: The war games are over and the Doctor is put on trial.

programme.title: Classic Doctor Who
programme.desc: The Master paves the way for an invasion by the insidious Nestene consciousness.

programme.title: Classic Doctor Who
programme.desc: The Master uses his hypnotic powers to take control of a factory where he creates Autons.

programme.title: Classic Doctor Who
programme.desc: The only clue to the Master's plans is a single plastic daffodil.

programme.title: Classic Doctor Who
programme.desc: The Master is broadcasting an activation signal to open a channel for the Nestenes.

programme.title: Classic Doctor Who
programme.desc: The planet Peladon is hoping to join the Galactic Federation.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: A border collie/greyhound mix with an aversion to other dogs; a woman tries to tame her dog's nervousness; a large dog with too much energy.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: Cesar helps Casey Anderson, of "Expedition Wild," and his wife, actress Missi Pyle, with their dogs; a pit bull's fears make him aggressive.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: Cesar joins forces with Jennifer McCarthy to examine the nature of wolf-dogs, the result of the cross-breeding of wolves and domestic dogs.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: Cesar revisits some of his toughest cases and sees how being on the show changed not only the dogs, but the lives of the owners.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: An Alaskan malamute exhibits aggressive tendencies; Cesar helps a professional dog walker with her clients.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: A German shepherd and Welsh corgi mix has dog aggression; a blind Lab chases his tail when he is around food.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: An aggressive bulldog; a beagle/terrier mix with a fear of trash cans; a Lab mix who starts to exhibit anxiety outside.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: A pit bull is aggressive toward strangers; a Rottweiler/Shar-Pei mix must get his aggression under control or be euthanized.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: A ridgeback/boxer mix's high energy develops into severe aggression; a couple's whippets bark and lunge at any dog that comes inside the boutique.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: Cesar helps the owner of a grooming business deal with difficult canine clients; a Chihuahua has a barking problem.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: A border collie is overprotective of his owner; a German shepherd is aggressive toward other dogs and people.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: An Australian shepherd/pit bull mix with severe aggression issues; a boxer's owners are concerned by her tendency to jump the six-foot backyard fence.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: Cesar helps actress Rhona Mitra curb her bulldog's violent tendencies; a newly-wed couples Chihuahua assumes dominance over their sheltie mix.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: NASA astronauts Suni Williams and Leland Melvin have worked on the International Space Station, but need Cesar's help with canine problems.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Christopher is barely 21, who already has a history of domestic abuse and assault, and now he's facing major time in a room without a view. This hunt won't be easy for Dog -- the leads are few, informers and family are not forthcoming.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Facing hard time for forging checks, Melissa pulled a vanishing act at her sentencing hearing, bolting from the courthouse in broad daylight. Lucky for her, bondsman Dog and his posse are in Colorado and ready to help.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog is busy. First, he's after a fugitive who is allegedly an expert in the game of "burn and return"--shoplifting goods to return them for cash refunds.? But he's not easy to track.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Going after two fugitives in one day is tough enough without the facing Colorado's notoriously unpredictable weather. Today it's the threat of severe thunderstorm, hail and area wide tornado warnings.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: It hurts Dog to see people who?after years of walking the straight and narrow, suddenly lose their way. But today's case is a member of the law enforcement community who has recently gone astray, and that truly troubles the Dog.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog is back in Denver and in hot pursuit of a woman wanted for identity theft. The sad reality is that the identity which has been robbed is her own. She's traded in a bright future for a life on the wrong side of the law.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Being hunted by the Dog is a lousy way to celebrate your birthday, but that's exactly the spot that Robert finds himself in today. He's missed his court date, quit his job, and vacated his last known address.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Both brother Tim and fellow Honolulu bondsman James need Dog's help to track down their hard to find fugitives. The two cases on the docket today are challenging, especially the hunt for Gregory, a felon with a lengthy rap sheet. A quick check of his

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: It's Beth's birthday and Dog knows just what she needs. He surprises Beth with Delilah, a puppy small enough to sit in the palm of her hand. Beth is so happy that she insists on taking the puppy with her on today's bounty.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: It's Halloween, and before Dog and Beth can help the kids carve their pumpkins, they have some business to attend to. It involves knocking on doors and meeting the neighbors, but instead of hunting for treats, they're on the search for a fugitive.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog and the team have girl trouble in this case. Krystal jumped bail and seems to have vanished into the high plains of Colorado. To make matters worse, she's running with her lover (and bond co-signer) Carrie. But Thelma and Louise they ain't.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Today, Leland and Dog make a quick visit to the police supply store to get some new gadgets for the team. But they can't linger because they've also got a fugitive to catch. Their target is reputed to have an explosive temper.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: When an offender, with a long record, ducks his day in court, Bobby Brown knows whom to call--The Dog!? And knowing that few souls can resist Beth's clever persuasion, Dog gives her the job of luring the fugitive in.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Today's case is a twofer, a brother and sister both charged with drug related offenses. Also, Dog has crossed paths with the brother before. He once tried to stop Dog from arresting one of the most violent fugitives of his career.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: When a brother bondsman from Washington State calls Dog for help tracking a runner in search of fun in the sun on the tropical paradise of Kauai, the team gets on the case. Dog's only problem? No leads!

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog and team help out a bondsman friend whose client jumped bail, but the target is a blank slate. Are his tattoos gang related? Is he likely to be violent? And making matters worse, when they hit his apartment, they learn he is moving out.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: They say you can't teach an old dog new tricks, but what if it's The Dog doing the teaching? Today's target is wanted on domestic abuse charges, but when Dog discovers she works for an escort service, he opts for a new twist on an old ruse.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Things get stressful when Dog and the team race to Honolulu International to catch a felon who's booked on an afternoon flight to Florida owing $140,000 to a bondsman.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: After Dog's son-in-law, Travis, signs off on an iffy bond and the accused turns into a fugitive, Dog and Beth decide to bring Travis on his first bounty. What better way to teach him than to show him just how hard it can be to bring in your man!

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog knows that it is better to give than to receive, so when a fellow bondsman grieving for his recently departed spouse requests his help, he jumps into action. While studying the fugitive's file, the team uncovers a surprising fact.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: No one becomes a bondsman overnight and even the members of Dog's team know there is always more to learn. So when Duane Lee cuts a felon a little too much slack about checking-in and then goes missing, Duane Lee knows he's gonna get schooled.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: What starts out as a perfect day for Dog turns ugly fast. He and Beth are enjoying helping their kids learn how to care for their new pets, when duty calls for a tough case. The charges: alleged cruelty to animals.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: In between tracking down a potentially dangerous ex-con facing a five-year stretch in the big house, Leland is struggling to find time to train and compete for his first boxing match in years.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog and family head to Kona to track down a wanted father who's looking to bolt to the mainland to evade sentencing. Meanwhile, Dog does some evading of his own - Avoiding the much dreaded birthday party!

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog and the team need to help Leland hunt down some elusive fugitives The case is a family affair with both mother and daughter in trouble with the law.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Karen is rushed to the hospital as she goes into labor; after Sean threatens Leslie, she confides in Dex, Sean's true identity; Dex warns Alexis that Sean may be seeking vengeance against her as she listens in horror.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Alexis warns Blake about Sean's true identity. Concerned for his family's safety, Blake and Dex go to Natumbre to uncover Sean's mysterious scheme involving the Vitron oil deal.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Following the explosion in Natumbre, Blake is accused of dealing in illegal arms; Alexis uncovers proof that Sean paid Jesse to return to Denver so he could persuade Karen to keep Adam's baby.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Dana tries desperately to convince Adam how much she wants their son. She proposes that if they were a loving couple again, the judge would find in their favor. Still hurting from her outburst in court, Adam is cold to her pleas.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Adam is absolved of suspicion in the kidnapping of his son when Leslie calls him to say that Sean has taken the baby and is holding her captive. Adam and Steven hurry to the desolate mountain cabin.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Following Sean's death, Alexis is comforted by Dex's solace and friendship, as the two renew their passionate love for each other; Jeff and Sammy Jo are horrified to find her diary and a dead body in the water.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Sammy Jo and Jeff are relieved when they discover the body found floating in the lake is not Krystle; Blake's fears increase when Krystle's car is found and the man arrested for stealing it is a convicted murderer.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Enjoying his time with Krystle in Dayton, Blake remains perplexed by the case of her memory lapses.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Blake gives Jeff one-third controlling interest in Denver-Carrington, postponing Adam's plans to gain sole control of the company; Blake and Krystle meet with Dr. Hampton to begin tests, while Blake tells her the true reason for her severe headaches.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Suspecting her accountant has worked with Sean to ruin Colbyco, Alexis faces the reality she may lose her empire; receiving bad news from her doctor, Krystle asks Fallon to gather the family.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Surrounded by those she loves, Krystle resolves to live; Fallon takes the picture of Blake and the dead man to the morgue, unaware she is being watched; Accusing Blake of killing him twenty-five years ago, Alexis vows to avenge his death.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Interpreting Alexis' vendetta against Blake as a love/hate relationship, Dex tells Alexis he is through being taken for granted by her; Sammy suspects Virginia may not be as naive as she wants people to think.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Krystle agrees to have her operation, but only after Blake signs her divorce papers and living will, to be enacted if the surgery is not a success; Fallon is haunted by recurring dreams of Roger Grimes.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Krystle's operation is unsuccessful and she slips into a coma. Told she will probably never recover, a grieving Blake returns to Denver; Sammy Jo is attacked by an unknown assailant; Dex discovers Joanna is a link to Alexis' controller, Heath.

programme.desc: THE HERD WITH COLIN COWHERD is a three-hour sports television show hosted by Colin Cowherd and Jason McIntyre. Cowherd is a veteran broadcaster with over 20 years of experience in the sports television and radio field.

programme.desc: Jean-Claude Van Damme squares off against his deadliest opponent yet -- himself -- when he stars as both a heinous serial killer and the replicated clone that scientists have constructed in order to kill him.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 1992, Laura Houghteling disappeared from her Bethesda home and was never seen again. Forensic scientists use evidence from her bedroom to direct police to a prime suspect.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: The woman had been sexually assaulted, stabbed repeatedly and left for dead. When a perfect suspect practically turned himself in, police were sure they had their man — until DNA evidence proved them wrong.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A woman's death in Pennsylvania triggers a homicide investigation into another woman's death in North Carolina. Faced with striking similarities, examiners must determine if their suspect's story about accidental drowning is all wet.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When an elderly couple died in a suspicious house fire, their son became the prime suspect. Investigators turned to forensic science to determine if the fire had been set deliberately, or if it was an unfortunate accident.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Rachael Mullenix, 19, was convicted of stabbing her mother, Barbara Mullenix, in 2006. She allegedly packed her mother's bloodied corpse in a cardboard box before dumping it in California's Newport Bay.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Tracey Frame, 35, was convicted of killing David Nixon in April 2002 after he planned to end their relationship.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Order Up
programme.desc: A man is found dead in his home and his ex-wife has a perfect alibi. To determine time of death, investigators need to know when the victim ate his last meal. An endocrinologist, a forensic botanist and a short-order cook answer their question.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In this episode, the decade-old murder of a young Texas housewife is investigated.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 2003, Kathy Lorick was murdered on a Concord, California jogging trail while talking to her husband on her mobile phone.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When the body of a young woman is found under an isolated highway ramp, a unique fiber on the victim's clothing leads San Diego police straight to the most unlikely of killers.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A serial arsonist starts several fires that cause millions of dollars worth of damage and the deaths of three people. He is discovered, partly through the use of forensic hypnosis.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Casino security cameras tracked a young woman's movements until shortly before she disappeared. She was never seen again, but through the evidence she left behind, she was able to tell investigators what happened to her and who was responsible.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: The murder of an American tourist in a Mexican resort draws law enforcement resources on both sides of the border. At first glance, the motive appears to be robbery, but careful analysis of the forensic evidence points to something more sinister.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Prompted by news of a flight attendant's brutal murder, the son of a previous victim contacts police. Both murders have similar MOs, and biological evidence proves that these were serial killings.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: California police had several suspects in the robbery and brutal murder of an elderly couple. Ten years later, a determined forensic scientist used material from a dentist's office to uncover ballistic evidence that had been overlooked.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: While investigating the apparent overdose suicide of Reverend Bill Guthrie's wife, detectives recover incriminating files from Bill's computer and learn of his infidelity.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When a dry cleaner employee is raped and murdered in her store, police turn to forensic science for the answers they need.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: They thought the fire would cover their crime. But one tiny clue, no bigger than a thumbtack, remained. It held all the information investigators needed to put a trio of cold-blooded killers behind bars.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Professional photographer Charles Rathbun claims model Linda Sobek died during a consensual sexual encounter gone wrong, but Sobek's corpse and digital imaging tell a more sinister story.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: While vacationing in California, Earl Morris learns that his wife has gone missing from their Arizona home. The search for Ruby Morris involves dozens of investigators and scientists — and even the Coast Guard.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When a college student is reported missing, police believe their investigation will be like countless others. But when they discover blood spatter in her boyfriend's bedroom, they know this case is going to be different.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Within Arm's Reach
programme.desc: A police officer accused of killing his estranged wife insists she committed suicide. Investigators say it was murder — that it was physically impossible for the woman to have shot herself.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: It was one of the most brazen crimes of the 20th century. Adolph Coors III, chairman of the Coors Brewing Company, was kidnapped and held for ransom. The crime prompted one of the most intense manhunts in United States history.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A woman is found dead in a ravine, and crucial evidence has been washed away by severe thunderstorms. Twice, the trail turns cold. Almost 20 years later, an old hat and a chip of stainless steel brings the killer to justice.

programme.title: Forensic Files

programme.title: Forensic Files
